Known marker cited in cluster annotation

other_findings.finding: LC_1 cells are most abundant in the epidermal layer of adult skin samples.

evidence_quotes.quote: LC_1: Langerhans-like cells, positive for CD207 and EPCAM.
Cluster LC_1: Top DE genes include CD1A, CDH1.
LC_1 cells were predominantly located in the epidermal compartment of all adult skin donors.
